strategy: CLIMATE TECH + SUSTAINABILITY + CLEANTECH + IMPACT INVESTING
notes: CLIMATE TECH + SUSTAINABILITY + CLEANTECH + IMPACT INVESTING scan. 0 niches confirmed blue ocean. 10 duplicates filtered. Key finding: Corporate Climate Disclosure (25/25) is the highest-regulatory-urgency niche in this entire CI scan — SEC disclosure rules + EU CSRD create mandatory learning for CFOs, auditors, and sustainability officers at 50,000+ companies. Climate Risk Modeling (24/25) and ESG Investing (24/25) follow close behind with institutional mandates driving professional WTP. The climate tech category has a structural advantage over other categories: regulatory compliance creates non-optional demand. You don't WANT to learn TCFD — you HAVE to. That urgency converts to subscriber retention unlike lifestyle apps.
